name: contentforge
description: Open-source enterprise content pipeline — 21 skills, 13 agents, 29-pattern AI humanizer, real .docx output. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity.

interface.shortDescription: Open-source enterprise content pipeline — 21 skills, 13 agents, 29-pattern AI humanizer, real .docx output. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity.
interface.longDescription: 21 skills + 13 specialist agents + 11 quality gates + 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer + fact-checker subagent + three-category internal linking. Produces real .docx with embedded SEO/Quality/Production/Internal-Link appendices. EU AI Act Article 50 ready via C2PA .docx signing. Zero global hooks. 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. Per-phase checkpoint resume. Portable across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity via the Agent Skills open standard.
defaultPrompt: Run the ContentForge 11-phase pipeline for an article on EU AI Act compliance.
Humanize this draft against the 29-pattern AI-detection catalog.
Fact-check the claims in this draft against authoritative sources.
Generate a .docx of this article with C2PA provenance for EU distribution.
